mainEntity.name: What is the best food in Valheim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Late-game: Blood Pudding, Lox Meat Pie, Fish Wraps. Mid-game: Serpent Stew, Turnip Stew, Sausages. Early-game: Cooked Meat, Queen's Jam, Grilled Neck Tail. Always maintain 3 different foods.

mainEntity.name: How do I find silver in Valheim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Silver is in Mountain biome underground. Need Iron Pickaxe+ and Wishbone (Bonemass drop). Dig where Wishbone pulses fastest. Silver spawns at 80-100m elevation.
